channel.title: Vibe Coding Diary
channel.description: By the willows of West Lake, code grows with the breeze. A journey of vibe coding along the lakeside.

item.title: The Whitespace of Architecture: Designing Systems Like West Lake
item.description: Good architecture isn't about filling every possibility — it's about leaving room to breathe. The boundaries between microservices, like the broken bridge in winter snow, rely on poetic intention.

item.title: The Core Module Written While Eating Fries
item.description: Ditching the rigid UML diagrams, on a perfectly sunny afternoon, I wrote the core scheduling engine on pure intuition while munching on fries.

item.title: From Engineer Mindset to Gardener Mindset
item.description: We always want to build indestructible machines, but mature systems are more like ecological gardens. The architect is the gardener with the shears.
